info.name: Workday Extend Workday Graph API
info.description:
Graph API for querying and traversing Workday data using a flexible, graph-based approach. Provides a unified query interface for accessing interconnected Workday business objects and their relationships. Supports Workday Query Language (WQL) for complex data retrieval and GraphQL-style queries across the Workday platform, enabling developers to efficiently access workers, organizations, positions, and other business objects.

Contact Support:
 Name: Workday Developer Support

item.name: Workday Extend Execute a graph query

request.description: Executes a graph query against the Workday data model. Supports field selection, filtering, relationship traversal, and pagination. Returns the requested business objects with only the selected fields.

response.name: Successful query response with matching data

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Workday Extend Execute a WQL query

request.description: Executes a Workday Query Language (WQL) query for complex data retrieval. WQL uses SQL-like syntax to query business objects and supports filtering, sorting, aggregation, and relationship traversal. Results can be paginated using limit and offset parameters within the query.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Workday Extend Retrieve a specific business object type schema

variable.description: (Required) The name of the business object type

request.description: Returns the full schema definition for a specific business object type, including all fields, their types, relationships to other objects, and available query operations.

item.name: Workday Extend Retrieve the graph schema

request.description: Returns the full graph schema including all available business object types, their fields, relationships, and query capabilities. Used for introspection and discovery of the data model.
